landing.heroTitle: Find the right people. Pay only when you reveal.
landing.heroBody: Match your role anonymously against an enriched talent pool on skills, not CVs. See your strongest candidates instantly — and spend a credit only when you want to reach one.
landing.pricingBody: Pick a plan with reveals included. Need more? Top up with single credits whenever it suits you.
landing.tierTryBlurb: For trying things out at a calm pace with one focused hire.
landing.tierBasicBlurb: For teams hiring regularly that want a steady flow.
landing.tierProBlurb: For high-volume hiring across several roles at once.
landing.extraReveals: Need more reveals? Single credits are always available at €{price} each.
landing.heroEyebrow: Anonymous matching against the 8vance talent pool
landing.heroReassurance: No credit card to start. You only pay to reveal.
landing.howTitle: From role to conversation in four steps
landing.howBody: A calm, transparent process that keeps you in control of when you pay.
landing.step1Body: Describe the role and the skills you need. We turn it into a skills profile that searches the pool.
landing.step2Body: Get an instant, ranked list of best-fit candidates — fully anonymised, with a match score per skill.
landing.step3Body: Convinced by a match? Spend one credit to unlock that candidate’s identity and contact details.
landing.step4Body: A revealed candidate is exclusively yours for 14 days — time to reach out, with no competition.
landing.trustTitle: Skills first. Identity only when it counts.
landing.trustBody: Candidates are judged on what they can do, not who they are. Personal data stays shielded until you deliberately choose to reveal — fairer for candidates, sharper for you.
landing.trust1Body: Our matching looks at competencies and experience, not name, photo or background. That reduces bias and lifts relevance.
landing.trust2Body: Names and contact details stay hidden on the shortlist. Nothing is released without your explicit reveal.
landing.trust3Body: Data minimisation by default: you only process the data of candidates you actually approach.
landing.featureExclusivity: 14 days of exclusivity per revealed candidate
landing.finalTitle: Ready to find the right people, anonymously?
landing.finalBody: Create your first project today and see your first shortlist within minutes.
landing.footerTagline: Anonymous matching against an enriched talent pool. Pay only to reveal.

auth.signupSubtitle: Sign up to start matching anonymously with talents.
auth.signupClosedBody: Sign-up is disabled — ask an administrator for an account.
auth.verifySentBody: We've sent a verification link to the email you signed up with. Click it to activate your account. The link is valid for 24 hours.
auth.verifySentRetry: Didn't get the email? Check spam, or
auth.verifyCheckBody: We've sent a verification link to your email. Click it to finish setting up your account.
auth.verifyDonePickPlan: Your account is now active. Next: pick a plan to start matching.
auth.verifyDoneSignIn: Your account is now active. You can now sign in.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotSent: If that email has an account, we've sent a reset link.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetInvalidLink: This link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
auth.resetInvalidToken: This reset link is no longer valid. Request a new one.
auth.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, with one number or symbol.
auth.consentSuffix: , and consent to the processing of my data.

app.pastDueBody: Your last subscription payment failed. New reveals are paused until it's resolved.

projects.title: Your projects
projects.emptyBody: Start by creating your first project — describe the role and we'll match it against the talent pool.
projects.closeConfirm: Close this project? The shortlist and revealed candidates will be hidden and active reveals will end. You can reopen the project later.
projects.rerunPrecondition: Can't refresh matches yet — check the project details.
projects.rerunUnavailable: Matching service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
projects.actionInternal: Something went wrong. Please try again.

projectEdit.pageSubtitle: Adjust this role's criteria. We'll search for matching candidates again.
projectEdit.errorPrecondition: Some fields look off — please review them.
projectEdit.errorUnavailable: Matching service is currently unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
projectEdit.errorNotFound: Project not found or not accessible.
projectEdit.errorInternal: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again.

shortlist.matchingBody: This usually takes 30 to 90 seconds. Reload to refresh.
shortlist.failedBody: Try editing the project (skills, location) and re-running the match.
shortlist.closedBody: This project has been closed. The shortlist and revealed candidates are hidden. Reopen the project to show the candidates again.
shortlist.matchingScanBody: Scanning the talent pool — this can take up to a couple of minutes.
shortlist.partialBanner: Some talent pools could not be matched. Showing partial results.
shortlist.emptyBody: No one in this talent pool matched closely enough. Try broadening the required skills or adjusting the role.
shortlist.noCandidatesYet: No candidates yet. Try loosening the filter.
shortlist.noCandidatesFiltered: No candidates match the current filters.
shortlist.savedSearchesBody: We check this project regularly and email you as soon as a new candidate matches.
shortlist.name: Name
shortlist.moveErrorRevealRequired: Reveal the candidate first to move past shortlist.
shortlist.moveErrorGeneric: Couldn't move the candidate. Please try again.
shortlist.notePlaceholder: Add an internal note about this candidate…
shortlist.matchingSlow: Still working — reload the page to check again.
shortlist.keywordsHint: Press Enter to add. Prefix with - to exclude (e.g. react -manager).
shortlist.preferencesPrompt: Which parts of the profile matter most? Boost them.
shortlist.preferencesNote: Note: this re-weights the shortlist already loaded on this page — it does not re-run 8vance's matcher.
shortlist.preferencesRematchCta: Surface new candidates? Edit the project & re-match

reveal.confirmBody: One credit. 14 days of exclusive access including name, address, and CV.
reveal.lockedByOther: This candidate has already been revealed by another customer and is exclusive until
reveal.errInsufficientCredits: Not enough credits. Top up to reveal.
reveal.errLocked: Candidate already revealed by another customer.
reveal.errLockedUntil: Candidate already revealed by another customer. Until {date}.
reveal.outreachNotRevealed: Reveal this candidate before contacting them.
reveal.outreachError: Could not record outreach. Please try again.
reveal.errPastDue: Subscription past due. Update your payment method to reveal candidates.

settings.notificationsBody: Choose which notifications you receive by email and in the app.
settings.teamBody: Invite colleagues to share projects and shortlists. Credits stay per-user.
settings.pipelineBody: Configure the Kanban stages your team moves candidates through.
settings.emailTemplatesBody: Customize the standard emails your team sends to candidates and members.
settings.securityBody: Change your password or email address.
settings.dataAccountBody: Export all your data or permanently delete your account (GDPR right to erasure).

notifications.title: Notification preferences
notifications.subtitle: Pick how you'd like to be notified for each event. Email and in-app are both on by default.
notifications.defaultsNote: If you haven't changed anything, both channels are on.

new_match.label: New matches
new_match.description: When a saved search finds new candidates.

reveal_confirmation.label: Reveal confirmation
reveal_confirmation.description: When you reveal a candidate and spend a credit.

low_credits.label: Low credits
low_credits.description: When your credit balance is running low.

notifications.centerSubtitle: Your most recent notifications, newest first.
notifications.newMatchDetail: {count, plural, one {# new candidate} other {# new candidates}} for {project}
notifications.newMatchDetailCandidate: {count, plural, one {# new job} other {# new jobs}} for {candidate}

wizard.pageSubtitle: Tell us about the role. We'll find matching candidates anonymously.
wizard.poolsDescription: Pick one or more 8vance pools to match this role against. You can combine multiple pools — candidates from each will appear in the shortlist, tagged with their source pool.
wizard.noPoolsConfigured: No talent pools configured yet. Ask an admin to add one in
wizard.projectTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Senior backend engineer — payments team
wizard.functionNameHint: Pick the closest standardised job title.
wizard.mapDragHint: Drag the marker to adjust the location
wizard.mapResolveError: Couldn't resolve that location — the previous location was kept. Try a different spot.
wizard.languagesHint: Pick the languages a candidate should master.
wizard.suggestionsHeading: Suggested skills for this role — click to add
wizard.suggestionsEmpty: No suggestions — search for a skill below.
wizard.minExperienceHint: Used to surface candidates with enough hands-on experience. Leave at no minimum to skip.

billing.title: Choose a plan
billing.subtitle: Subscriptions reset every 2 months. Extra reveals available on demand.
billing.unavailable: Payments are currently unavailable. Please try again later or contact support.
billing.extraBody: Top up your credit balance any time at €{price} per reveal.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your matching activity at a glance.
dashboard.chartSubtitle: Reveals per week over the last 8 weeks.
dashboard.chartEmpty: No reveals yet. Your activity will show up here.
dashboard.onboardBody: Describe a role and we'll match it anonymously against the talent pool. You only spend a credit when you reveal a candidate.
dashboard.onboardStep1: Describe the role: function, location and must-have skills.
dashboard.onboardStep2: We match it against the talent pool and show anonymized candidates.
dashboard.onboardStep3: Reveal the candidates you like — 14 days of exclusive access each.
dashboard.chartAria: Reveals chart: {count} reveals over the last {weeks} weeks

reveals.title: Reveals
reveals.subtitle: Your revealed candidates and credit spend.
reveals.empty: You haven't revealed any candidates yet.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Colleagues in your team share all projects and shortlists. Credits and reveals stay per-user.
team.inviteHint: Enter their email. If they already have an account they join immediately; otherwise they join your team when they sign up.
team.invitePending: Invitation saved — they'll join your team when they sign up.
team.inviteEmailFailed: Could not send the invite email.
team.copyHint: No email configured? Copy this link and send it to your colleague yourself.
team.errInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
team.errNotOwner: Only the team owner can manage members.
team.errAlreadyMember: That person is already in your team.
team.errInOtherOrg: That person already belongs to another team.
team.errLastOwner: You can't remove the last owner.
team.errInternal: Something went wrong. Please try again.

emailTemplates.title: Email templates
emailTemplates.subtitle: Customize the standard emails your team sends. Dynamic values use '{placeholders}'.
emailTemplates.readOnlyNote: Only the team owner can edit email templates.
emailTemplates.errNotOwner: Only the team owner can edit templates.
emailTemplates.errInvalid: Invalid input. Check the subject and body.
emailTemplates.errInternal: Something went wrong. Please try again.

pipeline.revealGateHint: Reveal this candidate first to move them past Shortlist.
pipeline.noStages: No pipeline stages yet. Add some in settings.
pipeline.settingsSubtitle: Configure the Kanban stages for your team. This board applies to every project.
pipeline.terminalHint: Final stages mark the end of the pipeline (e.g. Hired, Rejected).
pipeline.errInvalid: Please enter a valid stage name.
pipeline.errLastStage: You can't remove the last stage.
pipeline.errInternal: Something went wrong. Please try again.
pipeline.confirmMovesHint: Ask for confirmation before a candidate is dragged to another stage. Prevents accidental moves — important once automations are attached to stages.
pipeline.confirmMovesOwnerOnly: Only the organisation owner can change this.

candidates.title: Candidates
candidates.newPageSubtitle: Add a candidate and match them to jobs right away.
candidates.emptyBody: Onboard your first candidate or send a self-onboard link.
candidates.inviteLinkHint: Copy a magic link for the candidate (valid 14 days).
candidates.poolHint: The talent pool the candidate is created in.
candidates.pickPoolFirst: Pick a pool first to search skills.
candidates.cvHint: Stored as plain text for enrichment.
candidates.notesPlaceholder: Short summary or context about the candidate...
candidates.notesHint: Recruiter note. Synced to the 8vance profile (about me).
candidates.sourcesHint: Where do we look for matching jobs?
candidates.travelHint: Higher-educated candidates typically commute further — adjust if you know better.
candidates.error_invalid: Some fields look off. Please review your input.
candidates.error_internal: Something went wrong. Please try again.
candidates.portalSubtitle: Confirm your details and preferences, and we'll find matching jobs.
candidates.portalSkillsHint: Adjust your level or remove skills that don't fit.
candidates.portalNeedMoreSkills: At least 3 skills are required. Please contact your recruiter.
candidates.portalDoneBody: Your profile has been received. We'll look for matching jobs.
candidates.portalWarningSyncFailed: We saved your details, but couldn't sync them to 8vance right now. Your recruiter will retry shortly.
candidates.portalWarningMatchFailed: We saved your details, but matching couldn't start right now. Your recruiter will retry shortly.
candidates.portalExpiredBody: This link is no longer valid. Please ask your recruiter for a new one.
candidates.portalPrivacyNote: Your data is only used to match you to jobs.
candidates.cvExtractHint: Auto-extract skills from the pasted CV.
candidates.cvExtractDone: Added {count, plural, one {# skill} other {# skills}} from the CV.
candidates.cvExtractUnresolved: {count} skills not recognized: {names}. Add them manually.
candidates.cvRateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
candidates.cvAuthFailed: Could not fetch skills: this tenant's 8vance connection is failing (check the credentials).
candidates.cvExtractError: Could not read the CV. Add skills manually.
candidates.sourcesPickHint: Pick which sources this candidate is matched against (own pool, open market and connected companies).
candidates.cvUploadHint: PDF, Word (.doc/.docx) or text (.txt), max 5 MB.
candidates.cvUploadingHint: Hang on — a scanned PDF can take a little longer.
candidates.cvUploadDone: {name} imported — review the CV text above.
candidates.cvUploadError: Could not read this file. Try another file or paste the CV text.
candidates.cvExtractDoneGrouped: Added {hard} hard / {soft} soft skills from the CV.
candidates.emptyInviteHint: Create a candidate first, then generate a self-onboard link per candidate.
candidates.draftInviteHint: Pick a pool and generate a link. The candidate fills in their own name, contact details and CV; we extract the skills from the CV.
candidates.draftInviteReady: Link created — share it with the candidate (valid for 14 days).
candidates.portalCvHint: Paste the full text of your CV. We automatically extract your skills from it.
candidates.portalCvProcessingHint: This may take a moment while we recognise your skills.
candidates.portalCvDoneBody: Thank you! We have processed your CV and will look for matching jobs.
candidates.portalCvFewSkills: We could not yet extract enough skills from your CV. Your recruiter will finish your profile.
candidates.cvUploadDoneOcr: {name} read via OCR (scanned PDF) — your skills are on the Skills step.
candidates.consentNotice: Your data is processed and synced to 8vance for job matching. You can request a data export or deletion at any time. Your data is retained as long as your profile is active.
candidates.consentRetention: Retention: as long as the profile is active.
candidates.consentRecruiterLabel: I confirm I have the candidate's consent to process and sync their data.
candidates.consentCandidateLabel: I consent to my data being processed and synced to 8vance for job matching.
candidates.deleteError: Could not delete. Please try again.
candidates.portalDeleteHint: Don't want to continue? You can delete your data.
candidates.portalDeleteError: Could not delete. Please try again.
candidates.publicLinkHint: Pick a pool and embed this stable link on your website. Anyone who registers becomes a new candidate in this pool that you can review and sync afterwards.
candidates.publicLinkReady: Embed this link on your website — reusable and never expires.
candidates.filterSkillsHint: Separate multiple skills with a comma — a candidate must have all of them.
candidates.filterResultCountWithPool: {count, plural, one {# result} other {# results}} — pool included
candidates.filterRichPoolNote: Advanced filters apply to registered candidates only.
candidates.poolTotal: {count, plural, one {# talent in pool} other {# talents in pool}}
candidates.poolTotalAcross: {count, plural, one {# talent} other {# talents}} across {pools, plural, one {# pool} other {# pools}}
candidates.poolSearchLocalNote: Filtered locally on this page (8vance search not supported).
candidates.poolImportHint: Create a local candidate from this pool talent so you can manage it.
candidates.poolProfileUnreachable: This talent profile could not be read from 8vance.
candidates.bulkConfirmAll: Import {count, plural, one {# talent} other {# talents}}? Runs in the background.

apply.heading: Register with {pool}
apply.intro: Leave your details and we'll get in touch as soon as there's a suitable opening.
apply.cvHint: Paste the text of your CV. We keep it so a recruiter can complete your profile later.
apply.consentNotice: Your data is processed so a recruiter can contact you about suitable openings.
apply.consentRetention: Retention: for as long as your registration is active.
apply.consentLabel: I consent to my data being processed for job matching.
apply.successBody: We've received your details and will be in touch as soon as there's a suitable opening.
apply.privacyNote: Your data is treated confidentially and never shared without your consent.
apply.errorRateLimited: Too many submissions in a row. Please try again in a minute.
apply.errorNoPool: This registration link is no longer valid.
apply.errorInvalid: Please check your details and try again.
apply.errorInternal: Something went wrong. Please try again.

candidateMatch.totalJobs: {count, plural, one {# job found} other {# jobs found}}
candidateMatch.agencyHidden: {count, plural, one {# staffing-agency job hidden} other {# staffing-agency jobs hidden}}
candidateMatch.hideAgenciesHelp: Vacancies from staffing, secondment and recruitment agencies are hidden by default. Turn off to show them with an explanation.
candidateMatch.searchPlaceholder: Search by job title or employer
candidateMatch.citySearchPlaceholder: Search any city — also to relocate…
candidateMatch.cityMoreHint: {n, plural, one {+# more city in the results below} other {+# more cities in the results below}}
candidateMatch.cityFilterNoHits: No matched job in a city with that name (only cities from this candidate's results are listed)
candidateMatch.emptyRelocateBody: No open-market matches here. Search a city above to look elsewhere, or the candidate has no location to bound the feeds.
candidateMatch.filterScopeHint: Applies to the {n} jobs with a known location
candidateMatch.whyHidden: Why flagged as a staffing agency?
candidateMatch.emptyBody: Adjust your filters or show staffing agencies to see more results.
candidateMatch.noRunBody: Run a match to find jobs for this candidate.
candidateMatch.failedBody: Something went wrong while matching. Try running the match again.
candidateMatch.failedNotSyncedBody: This candidate isn't linked to 8vance yet, so no jobs could be matched. Sync and match to try again.
candidateMatch.notSyncedBody: This candidate hasn't been synced to 8vance yet. Sync and match to find jobs.
candidateMatch.errNoConsent: Can't sync: the candidate hasn't given data-processing consent. Record consent first, then match.
candidateMatch.errNoSkills: Can't sync: the profile needs at least 3 recognized skills. Add skills, then match.
candidateMatch.errSyncFailed: Syncing to 8vance failed. Check the connection and try again.
candidateMatch.errSyncAuth: 8vance authentication failed — check the pool's credentials.
candidateMatch.errSyncSource: The pool's source is not configured correctly in 8vance.
candidateMatch.errSyncCompany: This pool's 8vance company is not permitted.
candidateMatch.errForbidden: You don't have access to this candidate.
candidateMatch.errNotFound: This candidate could not be found.
candidateMatch.errFailed: Couldn't start the match. Please try again.
candidateMatch.matchingFoundCount: {count, plural, one {# job found} other {# jobs found}}
candidateMatch.matchingSlow: This is taking longer than usual — we keep searching.
candidateMatch.matchingBackground: Still searching — feel free to do something else. Matching keeps running in the background, so you don't have to stay on this page.
candidateMatch.matchingCapped: Still working in the background — reload the page to check for results.
candidateMatch.emptyFilteredBody: Adjust your filters or turn off 'Hide staffing agencies' to see more vacancies.
candidateMatch.truncationNote: Results may be capped: only a limited number of sources are searched and some sources can be skipped.
candidateMatch.sourcesTruncated: {count, plural, one {# source was not fully searched} other {# sources were not fully searched}} (too large or too many). Deselect some sources for a complete match.
candidateMatch.scoreOnOpen: See details for the real match score
candidateMatch.skippedReason_feed_too_large: Source '{slug}' is too large to match synchronously.
candidateMatch.skippedReason_timeout: Source '{slug}' took too long and was skipped.
candidateMatch.skippedReasonHint_feed_too_large: A large open-market feed (e.g. JobDigger) is too big to search without filters — add a location or narrow the sources.
candidateMatch.skippedReasonHint_filter_required: Large open-market feeds (e.g. JobDigger) were skipped because this candidate has no location — add a location to the profile to include those jobs.
candidateMatch.skippedReasonHint_timeout: A source took too long and was skipped — try again or add a location to narrow the search.
candidateMatch.skippedReasonHint_async_not_allowed: A source requires async matching, which isn't enabled on these credentials yet.
candidateMatch.skippedReasonHint_not_attempted: Cause: the per-run source limit was reached.
candidateMatch.skippedReasonHint_error: A source couldn't be searched due to a temporary error.
candidateMatch.suggestionsAnalyzing: 8vance is analysing the CV… (suggestions will appear shortly)
candidateMatch.suggestionsNone: No improvements found — the profile already looks complete.
candidateMatch.suggestionsScanError: Couldn't scan the CV against 8vance just now.

note.title: Recruiter note
note.hint: Internal note (synced to 8vance 'about me' on the next sync).

edit.title: Edit candidate
edit.errFailed: Couldn't save the changes. Please try again.
edit.errPartial: Some changes couldn't be saved to 8vance. Check the profile and retry.
edit.skillNoResults: No skills found for that search.
edit.eduApiNote: Note: degree and field of study can't be saved via the 8vance API yet — only school and dates are stored.
edit.aboutHint: Short profile summary, synced to the talent's 'about me' in 8vance.

gap.error: Could not load the gap analysis.
gap.noJobSkills: Required skills aren't available for this job.

staffingRules.title: Staffing-agency rules
staffingRules.subtitle: Manage how candidate matching detects staffing-agency vacancies.

defaults.title: Built-in defaults
defaults.note: These built-in patterns can't be edited. Extend them with custom rules below.

custom.title: Custom rules
custom.note: Global rules that extend the defaults. Patterns are stored lowercased and matched as substrings.

errors.internal: Something went wrong. Please try again.

security.title: Security
security.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, with one number or symbol.
security.noPassword: This account has no password set.
security.emailBody: Change your account email. You'll need to confirm the new address.
security.emailConfirmSent: We've sent a confirmation link to the new address.
security.emailTaken: That email address is already taken.
security.confirmInvalidBody: This confirmation link is invalid or has already been used.
security.confirmExpiredBody: This link has expired. Request the change again.
security.confirmWrongUser: This link doesn't belong to your account.
security.confirmTakenBody: This email address has since been taken by someone else.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.body: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or head back home.

defaultPool.heading: Default candidate pool
defaultPool.help: New candidates are created in this pool by default.
